summary: Planned conservative, non-mutating PR inventory classifications. The hydrated preflight artifact contains live state for #84525 through #84645 only; later refs from the job body are left as item-scoped needs_human because target_updated_at/live PR state was unavailable after compaction. No merge, fix, or close actions are planned.
